subject: Babidi's Spaceship — location/stadium card depicting the interior of a domed alien vessel
description: The image depicts the interior of a large domed or saucer-shaped spacecraft. The dominant visual is a massive cream-colored curved ceiling arching overhead, with a distinctive vertical striped or ribbed panel running down the center interior wall. The space below the arch is an arena-like floor area. The palette is muted and institutional — cream, beige, and off-white — giving the vessel an alien but functional, utilitarian feel. No figures are present. This is a pure location/stadium card.
foreground: Interior arena floor of a domed spacecraft with curved cream-colored walls
background: Large curved ribbed dome ceiling, pale institutional coloring
